name: kbridge-pin-gear-animate
description: Phase C1 of the trust-chain plan: pin-gear, the FIRST INFERRED GEAR TRANSMISSION. The extraction never captured the pin-tooth mesh (Inventor read 8 DOF); the bridge's gear inference fit the recorded signed wheel angles (joint_1 = 1.9976 x joint_0, max residual 0.44 deg over a 72 deg span) and emitted a CPig gear transmission, making the wheel pair 1-DOF and sweepable. The sweep drives the emitted driver (joint_1, 0->72 deg, no overrides); the gear constraint turns the pin wheel at half rate. Scrub Step to watch BOTH wheels turn in 2:1 ratio. Pass/fail = Converged + SlopSuccess. doc=MM, CPig-only. Slop: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/pin-gear-bind-sweep-animate.canary.slop.json.

setup.vlmDescription: A pin-gear drive shown as shaded solid CAD parts: a large pin wheel and a smaller gear on two house brackets, both posed mid-rotation and meshed at their rims, overlaid with a CPig frame-triad skeleton, at a sane scale.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: Pin-gear pair posed mid-sweep by CPig's solve, both wheels rotated in 2:1 ratio via the inferred gear transmission.

checkpoints.name: front
checkpoints.description: Front view: Pin-gear pair posed mid-sweep by CPig's solve, both wheels rotated in 2:1 ratio via the inferred gear transmission.
